<!-- source-snippet repo="canton" path="community/app/src/test/resources/external-ha-sequencers-remote-admin-parsing.conf" commit="268d267439898d0927bd547f3d7a30ff469b46aa" snippet="community/app/src/test/resources/external-ha-sequencers-remote-admin-parsing" location="fullFile" -->
```conf
  canton {
    remote-sequencers {
      sequencer1 {
        # these details are provided to other nodes to use for how they should connect to the sequencer
        public-api {
          address = sequencer1.local
          port = 1235
          tls {
            enabled = true
            trust-collection-file = "community/app/src/test/resources/tls/some.pem"
          }
        }
        # the server used from running administration commands
        admin-api {
          address = sequencer1.local
          port = 1235
        }
      }
    }
  }

```
